request.body: {"model":"gpt-4o-mini","input":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a travel assistant. Check weather for all cities before making a recommendation."},{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"I want to visit New York, Miami, or Seattle this weekend for outdoor activities. Check the weather in all three cities, then get activity recommendations for the best destination."}]},{"type":"function_call","call_id":"call_ixQNyqgo2oPAgEQAuVryMbmT","name":"getWeather","arguments":"{\"city\":\"New York, NY\"}"},{"type":"function_call","call_id":"call_CDYXdRnSrxsuaS0BZrRuPCr2","name":"getWeather","arguments":"{\"city\":\"Miami, FL\"}"},{"type":"function_call","call_id":"call_I0LgBUxmcg5UiSCvolnL67k3","name":"getWeather","arguments":"{\"city\":\"Seattle, WA\"}"},{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_ixQNyqgo2oPAgEQAuVryMbmT","output":"{\"city\":\"New York, NY\",\"tempF\":58,\"conditions\":\"overcast\"}"},{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_CDYXdRnSrxsuaS0BZrRuPCr2","output":"{\"city\":\"Miami, FL\",\"tempF\":84,\"conditions\":\"sunny\"}"},{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_I0LgBUxmcg5UiSCvolnL67k3","output":"{\"city\":\"Seattle, WA\",\"tempF\":52,\"conditions\":\"overcast\"}"}],"temperature":0,"store":false,"tools":[{"type":"function","name":"getWeather","description":"Get current temperature and sky conditions for a city","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City name, e.g. \"Miami, FL\""}},"required":["city"]}},{"type":"function","name":"getActivities","description":"Get recommended activities for a city given the current temperature","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string"},"tempF":{"type":"number","description":"Current temperature in Fahrenheit"}},"required":["city","tempF"]}}],"tool_choice":"auto"}
